name: lunaclaw-brief
description: Config-driven AI report engine with high-certainty pipeline: QualityGate (pass/retry/degrade/block), Fact Table + Grounding, Citation traceability (claim→evidence→source) in HTML/PDF, Golden Set regression runner, full pipeline observability, Scoring v2 (BM25+MMR+CJK), multi-model LLM router, 9 editors, 10+ data sources, configurable brand & gate thresholds.
author: llx9826
